Runway (AI 视频).text: If you have an idea. Make it. No need for approvals, budget meetings or round after round of scaling down the ambition. From idea to execution, this short ad was created by a single creative with Runway. #MadeWithRunway

MiniMax (海螺 AI).text:
Love seeing M2.7 in the hands of builders 

@atomicbot_ai
 turning a prompt into Flappy Lobster — code written, files saved, game running on your desktop.

This is what open-source frontier models were made for.
